zh.Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, UK: 英國英格蘭爾鄧翰 梅西
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon de Massey II於大約1100年出生在英國爾包頓時，他的父親Hamon I de Massey 1st Baron of Dunham45歲，母親Margaret de Sacey25歲。他於1124年與Eleanore de Beaumont在英國英格蘭爾鄧翰 梅西結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1140年在英國英格蘭爾鄧翰 梅西享年41歲。

zh-hans.Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, UK: 英国英格兰爾鄧翰 梅西
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon de Massey II于大约1100年出生在英国爾包頓时，他的父亲Hamon I de Massey 1st Baron of Dunham45岁，母亲Margaret de Sacey25岁。他于1124年与Eleanore de Beaumont在英国英格兰爾鄧翰 梅西结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1140年在英国英格兰爾鄧翰 梅西享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Massey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Massy, a pet form of Matthew . Compare Mace .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of several places in Normandy, such as Macey (Manche), Massy (Seine-Maritime), Macé-sur-Orne (Orne), and La Ferté Macé (Orne).
English: variant of Marsay (see Marcey ).

variants.name: Mace
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Masse, probably a shortened form of Matthew (compare Massey and Massett ) or possibly of Thomas .
French and Breton (Macé): from the French personal name Macé, a vernacular form of Mathieu ‘Matthew’. Compare Masse 5 and Maze 3.

French (Macé): habitational name from Macé or La Ferté-Macé in Orne, the former so named from Gallo-Roman Macciacum (from the personal name Maccius + the locative suffix -acum), the latter from the personal name Macé (see 2 above).

variants.name: Massie
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeen): variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Marsee
meanings: English: altered form of   Massey  .

variants.name: Massee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Germain.
Possibly an altered form of English   Massey  .
French (Massée): from the feminine form of Massé (see Masse ). This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Massa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Antonio, Silvio, Annamarie, Biagio, Caesar, Carmela, Dante, Elisabetta, Ennio.

Italian: habitational name from any of various places called Massa, for example Massa Lubrense or Massa di Somma, both in Naples province, or Masse d'Albe in Aquila, all named from medieval Latin massa ‘farm, estate’ (from Latin massa ‘mass, lump, pile’, Greek maza). This surname is also found in southern France (see Massey 5).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Macey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .
Americanized form of Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Macej or Mačej and Polish Maciej , derivatives of the Latin personal name Matthaeus (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Masey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Macy
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Raimundo . See Raymond .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon de Massey II was born about 1100, in Bowdon, Cheshire, England, his father, Hamon I de Massey 1st Baron of Dunham, was 45 and his mother, Margaret de Sacey, was 25. He married Eleanore de Beaumont in 1124, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1140, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon de Massey II est né environ 1100, à Bowdon, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hamon I de Massey 1st Baron of Dunham, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Sacey, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Eleanore de Beaumont en 1124, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1140, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

Er hat 1124 in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Eleanore de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. ja.lifeSummary: Hamon de Massey IIが約1100年にイギリスチェシュアイアボウドンで生まれた時，父Hamon I de Massey 1st Baron of Dunhamは45歳，母Margaret de Saceyは25歳であった。1124年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイでEleanore de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1140年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon de Massey II(이)가 대략 1100년 영국 체실르 보우던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamon I de Massey 1st Baron of Dunham(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Sacey(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1124년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 던함 마시에서 Eleanore de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 던함 마시에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon de Massey II родился около 1100 г. в местности боудон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hamon I de Massey 1st Baron of Dunham было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Sacey, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanore de Beaumont в 1124 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1140 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.
